text.title: Churn Prevention Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
introduce >= 5 cancellation reason codes before designing offers
cap offers at <= 50% LTV before launch
launch playbook; weekly margin + segment review

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=three-phase-not-discount-spray
